original_text:
### Contrast
- **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]
- Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
- **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

quotes: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid: Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Ensure digital accessibility compliance with WCAG standards.
rules.rule_text: Contrast levels must meet WCAG AA minimums (4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text >= 24px or 19px bold) for every text/background pair. Safe combinations include: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), or Graphite (#212121) on White (#ffffff), Light Blue (#E6F0F9), or Golden Sand (#FEF1C8); or White (#ffffff) text on Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), or Dark Navy (#011E45). Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text must never be placed on a White (#ffffff) background.

quotes: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Maintain compliance with non-color-dependence WCAG rules for low-vision and colorblind users.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; always pair color cues with icons, depth, clear copy, or other visual feedback.
